task_completion.description: The correct OpenToonz scene is opened.
task_completion.visual_evidence: OpenToonz is running and the title bar, xsheet, or timeline indicates that 'dwanko_run.tnz' is loaded.

task_completion.description: The logo file is imported into the scene.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A solid red square (the logo) is visible in the OpenToonz level strip, xsheet, or timeline as a new column/layer.

task_completion.description: The logo is scaled down and positioned in the bottom-right corner.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the main viewer, the red square is located in the bottom-right corner of the camera view and is significantly smaller (roughly 20-30%) than its original imported size.

task_completion.description: The logo opacity is reduced to approximately 50%.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the main viewer, the red square appears semi-transparent, allowing the underlying animation/background to be seen through it.

task_completion.description: The logo is exposed for the entire duration of the animation.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the xsheet or timeline, the column containing the red square logo extends downwards/across to match the length of the animation frames (up to frame 72).

task_completion.description: The output settings are configured correctly for a PNG sequence.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Output Settings' window is visible, showing the 'Save In' path set to '/home/ga/OpenToonz/output/watermark_test/' (or similar relative path) and the file format set to 'png'.

task_completion.description: The final PNG sequence is rendered to the target directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A render progress bar completes, or a file manager/terminal window shows multiple rendered PNG files (at least 20) inside the '/home/ga/OpenToonz/output/watermark_test' directory.

integrity.description: The agent used the OpenToonz graphical interface to perform the compositing.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with OpenToonz tools (Animate tool, FX schematic, Xsheet) rather than terminal-based compositing tools like FFmpeg or ImageMagick.

integrity.description: The agent rendered the output using OpenToonz.
integrity.visual_evidence: The OpenToonz render window or progress bar is visible in the screenshots, proving the software generated the output.

integrity.description: The agent did not use terminal scripts to bypass the GUI task.
integrity.visual_evidence: The terminal is not used to run python scripts or bash commands that automatically composite the images or generate the final PNG sequence.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The scene file is 'dwanko_run.tnz'. The logo is a dynamically generated 200x200 solid red square [255, 0, 0]. The output must be a PNG sequence saved to '/home/ga/OpenToonz/output/watermark_test'. At least 20 frames should be rendered for full credit.
